name: Fudge Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray an 8-inch square baking pan with nonstick cooking spray.
3. In a medium-sized bowl, stir together sugar, Sweet Ones (dark chocolate chips), margarine, eggs, Butter Buds Sprinkles, and vanilla extract.
4. In a small bowl, stir together dry ingredients: all-purpose flour, unsweetened cocoa powder, baking powder, and salt.
5. Stir the dry mixture into the liquid ingredients until just combined.
6. Spread the batter evenly into the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 25 minutes.
8. Cool on a wire rack.
9. Cut into 2-inch squares.
